subcodes.first_line: O son of faith and scion of certitude! Thou art born of faith and descended from certitude under the protection and providence of the Blessed Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ابن ایمان و سلاله ایقان زاده ایمانی و از سلاله ایقان در صون و عون جمال ابهی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @rejection, opposition and persecution
